_comment: Your affiliate links from PartnerStack and other programs. Format: 'tool-name-lower': {'url': 'your-affiliate-url', 'program': 'program-name', 'commission': 'rate'}
_instructions: Add your affiliate links here. content_engine.py will check this file first. If a tool is not found, it falls back to AFFILIATE_PROGRAMS or placeholder.

_placeholder.comment: If a tool has no affiliate link, use this placeholder URL
_placeholder.template: https:// EXAMPLE: replace with your tracking link or use direct URL
